languages.text: Chronomancer can attack targets without having Line of Sight to them and has unlimited attack range. His attacks only affect enemies and always hit

traits.locale_text: Chronomancer can attack targets without having Line of Sight to them and has unlimited attack range. His attacks only affect enemies and always hit

languages.text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

languages.text: Хрономант может атаковать цели даже вне {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоны видимости{/g} на любом расстоянии. Его атаки никогда не задевают союзников и не могут промахнуться.
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: Хрономант может атаковать цели даже вне {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоны видимости{/g} на любом расстоянии. Его атаки никогда не задевают союзников и не могут промахнуться.
Хрономант может атаковать цели даже вне {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоны видимости{/g} на любом расстоянии. Его атаки никогда не задевают союзников и не могут промахнуться.

languages.text: Le chronomancien peut attaquer des cibles, qu'elles se trouvent ou non dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g}, et sa portée offensive est illimitée. Ses attaques ne ciblent que des ennemis et font mouche systématiquement.
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: Le chronomancien peut attaquer des cibles, qu'elles se trouvent ou non dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g}, et sa portée offensive est illimitée. Ses attaques ne ciblent que des ennemis et font mouche systématiquement.

languages.text: Kronobaz, {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattında{/g} olup olmadığına bakmaksızın hedeflere saldırır ve sınırsız saldırı menziline sahiptir. Yaptığı saldırılar, yalnızca düşmanları hedefler ve asla ıskalamaz.
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: Kronobaz, {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattında{/g} olup olmadığına bakmaksızın hedeflere saldırır ve sınırsız saldırı menziline sahiptir. Yaptığı saldırılar, yalnızca düşmanları hedefler ve asla ıskalamaz.

languages.text: 编时匠的攻击不受{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}规则影响，且具有无限攻击距离。其攻击仅以敌人为目标，且必定命中。
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: 编时匠的攻击不受{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}规则影响，且具有无限攻击距离。其攻击仅以敌人为目标，且必定命中。

languages.text: El cronomante puede atacar a objetivos que no estén dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} y posee un alcance de ataque ilimitado. Sus ataques solamente se dirigen contra enemigos y no pueden fallar.
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: El cronomante puede atacar a objetivos que no estén dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} y posee un alcance de ataque ilimitado. Sus ataques solamente se dirigen contra enemigos y no pueden fallar.

languages.text: Der Chronomant kann Ziele unabhängig von seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} angreifen und hat eine unbegrenzte Reichweite. Seine Angriffe treffen nur Gegner und können ihr Ziel nicht verfehlen.
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: Der Chronomant kann Ziele unabhängig von seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} angreifen und hat eine unbegrenzte Reichweite. Seine Angriffe treffen nur Gegner und können ihr Ziel nicht verfehlen.

languages.text: クロノマンサーは{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視界{/g}の有無に関わらず攻撃対象を攻撃でき、攻撃範囲は無限大。攻撃対象は敵のみで、外れは無い。
languages.original_text: The Chronomancer can attack targets regardless of having {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and has unlimited attack range. Their attacks target only enemies and cannot miss.

traits.locale_text: クロノマンサーは{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視界{/g}の有無に関わらず攻撃対象を攻撃でき、攻撃範囲は無限大。攻撃対象は敵のみで、外れは無い。
